column1: # /Range Prot and /Range Unprot — toggle the per-cell unprotected
# flag. Effective only when /WGP Enable is on; attempting to edit a
# protected cell beeps and stays in READY.
# Editing A1 is now refused — the buffer never opens.
# /RU pick A1..A1 marks A1 as writable.
# A2 is still protected — edits are refused.
